title: agelaea borneensis
intro: Agelaea borneensis, also known as the Bornean Agelaea, is a species of plant in the family Connaraceae, native to Borneo. It has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Agelaea borneensis is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of a paste or ointment in traditional herbal remedies.
